params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, clear countertops, matte oak cabinetry, visible visual connection to dining bay, one ceramic tray or bowl, clean countertops, matte hardware and oak surfaces, visible lines to dining nook. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, family-friendly Japandi scheme that balances Scandinavian warmth and Japanese restraint. Warm neutrals, low-profile furniture, woven textures and tactile ceramics create a serene backdrop. Prioritize negative space, natural materials, and a small dedicated work corner while keeping circulation and crib placement safe. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
